mapper.select: select ef.id feedbackId,ef.video_content_path videoContentPath, ef.check_status checkStatus,ef.process_msg processMsg, eff.pic1_path pic1Path,eff.pic2_path pic2Path,eff.pic3_path pic3Path,eff.file_path filePath from event_feedback ef left join event_feedback_file eff on ef.id = eff.feed_back_id where ef.event_id = #{eventId} and ef.departmember_id = #{memberId}

select ef.id feedbackId,ef.video_content_path videoContentPath,ef.departmember_id as memberId,dm.`name` as memberName, ef.check_status checkStatus,ef.process_msg processMsg, eff.pic1_path pic1Path,eff.pic2_path pic2Path,eff.pic3_path pic3Path,eff.file_path filePath from event_feedback ef left join event_feedback_file eff on ef.id = eff.feed_back_id left join department_member dm on ef.departmember_id = dm.id where ef.event_id = #{eventId} and ef.check_status in(2,4) and ef.report_status = 2
